summary: Completed testing of 4 Collection Organizer bugfixes. All 12 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verification confirms all 4 fixes working: 1) Product names display on series cards (e.g., 'Travertine Beige 60x120'), 2) Viewport-height layout enables independent panel scrolling, 3) Category groups filtered to show only relevant ones (Plus39 shows only 'Tiles'), 4) LEPORCE supplier query returns empty array without crash.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Plus39 supplier data with 4 series (Travertine, Burlington, Artisan, Moonlight)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Collection Organizer bugfixes fully tested. Key changes verified: 1) Backend series endpoint returns product_names array (from $our_product_name or $product_name or $name), relevant_groups (set of product_groups), and ungrouped_count. 2) Backend uses $nin: [None, ''] filter to exclude null series. 3) Frontend filteredCategoryTree only shows groups matching supplier's relevant_groups. 4) Frontend uses viewport-height layout (calc(100vh - 140px)) for independent scrolling. Access Collection Organizer via /admin/sitemap -> click 'Collection Organizer' view button (third icon in view mode group).

backend: GET /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/series?supplier=Plus39 returns product_names array with actual product names
GET /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/series?supplier=Plus39 returns relevant_groups field (list of product_group slugs)
GET /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/series?supplier=LEPORCE does NOT crash - returns empty series array
GET /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/series?supplier=NONEXISTENT returns empty series without error
Backend $nin filter excludes null/empty series names from results
product_names limited to 5 items per series (as per $slice in aggregation)
Each series has required fields: name, count, product_names
frontend: Series cards display product names below the count (e.g., 'Travertine Beige 60x120', 'Travertine Grey 60x120')
Only relevant category groups show based on supplier (Plus39=tiles, so only Tiles group visible)
Collection Organizer uses viewport-height layout (calc(100vh - 140px)) for independent panel scrolling
Left panel (series list) scrolls independently from right panel (category tree)
Drag-and-drop elements present (4 draggable series, 11 droppable zones)
Supplier dropdown shows Plus39 with correct product/series counts
Collection Organizer accessible via /admin/sitemap -> Collection Organizer view button

bug_1_product_names.description: Show product display names on series cards
bug_1_product_names.evidence: Series cards show product names like 'Travertine Beige 60x120', 'Burlington White 60x60'

bug_2_independent_scroll.description: Left panel should scroll independently (not the whole page)
bug_2_independent_scroll.evidence: Container has style='height: calc(-140px + 100vh)' enabling viewport-constrained layout

bug_3_filtered_groups.description: Filter category groups to only show relevant ones for selected supplier
bug_3_filtered_groups.evidence: Plus39 (tiles supplier) shows only 1 category group zone (tiles), not all 5+ groups

bug_4_leporce_crash.description: Fix crash when selecting LEPORCE supplier (null series name crash)
bug_4_leporce_crash.evidence: API returns 200 with empty series array for LEPORCE/unknown suppliers, no 500 error
